sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74548" key="o(/plitis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὅπλῑτ-ις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, fem. of <sense id="n74548.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὁπλίτης, χεῖρες</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:150" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.150</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
